sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10347" key="a)ntiperisxi/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιπερι-σχίζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n10347.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be broken up and return,</tr_> of sputum, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0724.tlg002:1:174D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Steph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Hp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.174D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
